nodes.name: Webhook - Receive Mobile Request
nodes.notes:
Step 1: Entry point. Mobile app or pharmacist portal sends POST to this webhook.
Expected body: { query: string, image_url?: string, patient_weight_kg?: number }

nodes.name: Route - Has Image?
nodes.notes: If image_url provided: run OCR first. Otherwise: go straight to RAG query.

nodes.name: PharmaAI OCR - Prescription Analysis
nodes.notes: Calls /ocr endpoint. Returns OCR + safety analysis with drug names, interactions, dosing errors.

nodes.name: Build Query from OCR
nodes.notes: Constructs a RAG query string from OCR drug names + safety alerts.

nodes.name: PharmaAI RAG Query
nodes.notes: Step 2: Core RAG call. Returns StructuredClinicalResponse with drug_name, interaction_severity, clinical_rationale_the_why, bnf_source_page.

nodes.name: Format Telegram Alert
nodes.notes: Formats the structured response into a Telegram-ready MarkdownV2 message.

nodes.name: Route by Severity
nodes.notes: Routes CRITICAL/WARNING to urgent Telegram channel; INFO/SAFE to standard channel.

nodes.name: Telegram - CRITICAL Alert
nodes.notes: Step 3: Sends CRITICAL/MAJOR alerts to urgent pharmacist channel immediately.

nodes.name: Telegram - Standard Alert
nodes.notes: Sends WARNING/INFO to standard pharmacist notification channel.

nodes.name: Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Returns the StructuredClinicalResponse JSON back to the mobile app.

meta.description: PharmaAI n8n workflow. Step 1: Webhook receives query + optional prescription image from mobile app. Step 2: Calls Python FastAPI backend for Gemini OCR and/or ChromaDB RAG. Step 3: Formats and sends structured clinical alert to Telegram pharmacist channel. Required env vars: PHARMA_API_KEY, TELEGRAM_CRITICAL_CHAT_ID, TELEGRAM_STANDARD_CHAT_ID.
